name: p27_post_quartic_cas_suite
purpose: Executable fallback queue after the full B/K monic quartic GPU suite is negative or after a quartic hit needs deeper sourceability analysis.
entry_condition: Run after the full quartic GPU suite has no stable q1847/guard-field d3 hit, or when a quartic hit needs branch/genus/sourceability follow-up.

tasks.name: Normalize d3 source over P1_K
compute: compare d3 class across guard fields
tasks.promote_if: stable genus <= 1, named recurrence/sourceable walk, or cheap direct sampler
tasks.kill_if: high/generic branch degree or only visible K branch atoms

tasks.name: Normalize d3 source over P1_Sroot
compute: whether class descends to K or needs signed Sroot
tasks.promote_if: stable low-genus signed source or recurrence
tasks.kill_if: only odd semi-invariant classes or high/generic branch degree

tasks.name: Carry H90/order-4 action through the normalized K/S model
compute: alpha action on normalized model if feasible
tasks.promote_if: alpha quotient gives low-genus source or recurrence
tasks.kill_if: alpha does not preserve a useful low-genus factor

tasks.name: Offline B-line legal cover normalization
tasks.promote_if: low-genus B-line cover, recurrence, or sourceable projection
tasks.kill_if: high genus/generic cover with no quotient after saturation

tasks.name: Compare B/K bridge after any named class
compute: whether named class is visible in both coordinates
whether signed K root is essential
tasks.promote_if: bridge exposes a lower-genus or recurring class
tasks.kill_if: class remains coordinate-local and high genus

do_not_run: small integer K degree 3/4 coefficient scans
split K/S branch divisors of degree <=4
odd Sroot semi-invariant classes in the p27 sign regime
online Magma as the main B-line normalization engine

acceptance.kill: high/generic branch degree and unrelated fresh d4 half-cover after exact normalization
